entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R.Br. studied for male sterility.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition of male sterility controlled by mitochondrial genes.

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism used to analyze mitochondrial DNA patterns.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL DNA
entities.description: DNA located in the mitochondria used as a marker for identifying cms sources.

entities.name: SOUTHERN BLOT HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A laboratory method used to detect specific DNA sequences in mtDNA.

entities.name: ICMA 90111
entities.description: A specific male-sterile line of pearl millet derived from the Early Gene Pool.

entities.name: EARLY GENE POOL
entities.description: The genetic source (EGP 261) from which the new cms source was derived.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Crop used to provide heterologous gene clones for probing mtDNA.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Crop used to provide heterologous gene clones for probing mtDNA.

entities.name: DENDROGRAM
entities.description: A diagrammatic representation used to group male-sterile lines based on hybridization patterns.
